results.justification: EXACT TWIN — fine-grained Likert ordinal relevance judgments IS the 5-stage hal continuum ordinal evaluation mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — multi-judge ensemble + confidence-weighted scoring + scale design IS the lead+chorus dual evaluator mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — 0-5 grading scale (5-class) with highest human-LLM alignment IS the 5-stage hal continuum (kaif/kaifiyat/hal/wajd/fana 0-4) ordinal eval mechanism.
Reliable LLM-judge multi-stage calibration overlaps with lead+chorus dual + adab constraint calibration mechanism.
Attention consistency + variance per-layer overlaps with kanpna trembling attention-variance trance-marker mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — attention-head entropy patterns distinguish quality + white-box marker IS the kanpna attention-variance proxy mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — LLM emotional-state elicitation + arousal-valence + multi-turn maintenance IS the listener-LLM trance-proxy + hal-continuum-arousal mechanism.
VERDICT library scaling judge-time compute + multi-stage evaluation covers lead+chorus dual + multi-stage adab constraint.
